examples: She spoke Polish to her maternal grandmother and watched movies of Federico Fellini and Satyajit Ray with her cinephile dad.
With the centenary of cinema in 1995, the cinephile is free to select and view multitudes of films according to his or her own taste.
These films may not make the art-house circuit in America, but for this cinephile at least, they are funny and sophisticated and stand head and shoulders above most mainstream Hollywood films.
Out of all this, some cinema which finds a resonance with international cinephile audiences will emerge naturally.
Miles is a bibliophile, a cinephile, and an oenophile.
